title: GlassyUI
description: A clean and modern resource pack that turns your hotbar, hearts, armor and hunger icons into a sleek glass design. Perfect for PvP or anyone who wants a clean and minimal HUD.
body:
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ   ㅤㅤㅤㅤGlassyUI is a Clean and Minimalistik Texturepack for Minecaft!![ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8fbcc073ec72f8c4f407e92d19969dd24fdf354.png)
**🧊 Features**

- Fully redesigned container GUIs (chests, furnaces, crafting tables, etc.)

- Clean glassy hotbar with a modern aesthetic

- Redesigned Creative Inventory

-  Consistent UI style across all menus

- Subtle transparency for a premium glass effect

- Optimized for clarity, readability, and performance


**🔌 Mod Compatibility**          
Glassy UI is built with mod support in mind and works seamlessly with:  
- AppleSkin
- Uku’s Armor HUD
- Many other HUD & UI mods

**❤️ Like this pack?**                   
A lot of passion and attention to detail went into creating Glassy UI.           
If you use it in videos, streams, or screenshots, a small shout-out would be greatly appreciated 💙                          
UI design & implementation: **Tantosy**

**For Questions & Help Join My Discord:**https://discord.gg/udyd2bTpvv**
  ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
